title: Rename device - UI, device doesn't support
scenario: Device Name setting should not appear in the UI for devices that do not support renaming
steps: 2. Check if the device is one of the supported models: Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, or Sync 40 (TBD).
3. If the device is NOT in the supported list, verify that the 'Device Name' setting does NOT appear in the UI.
4. If the device IS in the supported list, verify that the 'Device Name' setting appears in the UI.
expected: The "Device Name" setting should only appear in the UI for supported devices (Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40 (TBD)). For all other devices, the setting should not be visible.
